title: Creating Agent Skills and MCP Servers
description: Developers and advanced agent users who need portable skills, secure MCP servers, and reliable integrations across Codex and Claude. This original, research-backed path uses repeated retrieval, cumulative artifacts, changed-case labs, stakeholder projects, and a performance exam.
outcomes: Demonstrate agent skills standard, discovery, progressive disclosure, tests, and distribution through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate mcp architecture, primitives, transports, sdk server construction, clients, and authorization through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate cross-client security, evaluation, operations, and 2026 protocol migration through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

competencies.statement: Separate one-turn prompts, repository instructions, reusable skills, enforcement hooks, plugins, and external tools by scope.
misconceptions: All recurring agent behavior belongs in a skill.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate one-turn prompts, repository instructions, reusable skills, enforcement hooks, plugins, and external tools by scope.

competencies.statement: Use AGENTS.md or equivalent repository guidance for durable local conventions.
misconceptions: Repository instructions should implement external API access.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use AGENTS.md or equivalent repository guidance for durable local conventions.

competencies.statement: Use a skill for a reusable workflow, expertise, scripts, references, or assets.
misconceptions: A skill is merely a long system prompt.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use a skill for a reusable workflow, expertise, scripts, references, or assets.

competencies.statement: Use MCP when live tools or external context must cross the agent-host boundary.
misconceptions: MCP is needed for ordinary local file edits.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use MCP when live tools or external context must cross the agent-host boundary.

competencies.statement: Use a plugin to distribute skills, connectors, hooks, and presentation assets as one installable unit.
misconceptions: Every personal skill requires a plugin package.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use a plugin to distribute skills, connectors, hooks, and presentation assets as one installable unit.

competencies.statement: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.
misconceptions: A skill is a single prompt file stored anywhere.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.

competencies.statement: Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.
misconceptions: Frontmatter fields do not affect discovery.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.

competencies.statement: Write imperative workflow steps, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and verification criteria.
misconceptions: Long narrative background is more useful than operational steps.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write imperative workflow steps, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and verification criteria.

competencies.statement: Route the agent to only the references or scripts needed for the current variant.
misconceptions: Every skill invocation should load every resource.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Route the agent to only the references or scripts needed for the current variant.

competencies.statement: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.
misconceptions: A skill should hard-code one machine layout.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.

competencies.statement: Front-load use cases and trigger terms in a concise skill description.
misconceptions: The skill name alone controls implicit selection.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Front-load use cases and trigger terms in a concise skill description.

competencies.statement: Write diverse prompts that should activate the skill.
misconceptions: One exact phrase is sufficient trigger coverage.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write diverse prompts that should activate the skill.

competencies.statement: Write adjacent prompts that must not activate the skill.
misconceptions: False-positive skill activation has no cost.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write adjacent prompts that must not activate the skill.

competencies.statement: Support explicit invocation when deterministic use is required.
misconceptions: Implicit matching should be mandatory for every skill.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Support explicit invocation when deterministic use is required.

competencies.statement: Measure missed triggers, false triggers, and competing-skill selection.
misconceptions: A skill that works after manual selection needs no trigger tests.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure missed triggers, false triggers, and competing-skill selection.

competencies.statement: Keep metadata discriminative within shared context budgets.
misconceptions: Descriptions should contain the full workflow.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep metadata discriminative within shared context budgets.

competencies.statement: Keep SKILL.md complete but route variant details to named resources.
misconceptions: Progressive disclosure means reading only part of SKILL.md.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep SKILL.md complete but route variant details to named resources.

competencies.statement: Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.
misconceptions: A references folder is an unstructured document dump.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.

competencies.statement: Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding.
misconceptions: Scripts should replace agent judgment in ambiguous decisions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding.

competencies.statement: Provide templates and assets that prevent inconsistent recreation.
misconceptions: Agents should regenerate standard artifacts on every run.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide templates and assets that prevent inconsistent recreation.

competencies.statement: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.
misconceptions: A readable SKILL.md guarantees correct execution.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.

competencies.statement: Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.
misconceptions: Skill scripts need no tests because an agent supervises them.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.

competencies.statement: Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.
misconceptions: A local skill is automatically trusted code.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.

competencies.statement: Version behavior changes and provide migration notes for consumers.
misconceptions: Editing a shared skill never breaks callers.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Version behavior changes and provide migration notes for consumers.

competencies.statement: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.
misconceptions: More instructions always fix skill reliability.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.

competencies.statement: Choose repository, user, admin, or system scope according to ownership and audience.
misconceptions: All skills should be global for convenience.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose repository, user, admin, or system scope according to ownership and audience.

competencies.statement: Inspect source, scripts, dependencies, and permissions before installing a skill.
misconceptions: Curated or popular skills need no security review.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inspect source, scripts, dependencies, and permissions before installing a skill.

competencies.statement: Package skills and related extension assets in a valid plugin manifest.
misconceptions: A plugin and a skill are the same artifact.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Package skills and related extension assets in a valid plugin manifest.

competencies.statement: Configure explicit or implicit invocation policy and declared dependencies.
misconceptions: Invocation policy cannot affect safety.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Configure explicit or implicit invocation policy and declared dependencies.

competencies.statement: Define ownership, approval, updates, disablement, and deprecation for shared skills.
misconceptions: Installed skills maintain themselves indefinitely.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define ownership, approval, updates, disablement, and deprecation for shared skills.

competencies.statement: Distinguish host, per-server client, server, model, user, and external service responsibilities.
misconceptions: The MCP server is the model host.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish host, per-server client, server, model, user, and external service responsibilities.

competencies.statement: Trace initialization, capability negotiation, requests, responses, notifications, and errors.
misconceptions: MCP is a stateless REST convention in every stable version.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Trace initialization, capability negotiation, requests, responses, notifications, and errors.

competencies.statement: Advertise and negotiate only implemented protocol capabilities.
misconceptions: Clients can assume every server supports every primitive.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Advertise and negotiate only implemented protocol capabilities.

competencies.statement: Map permissions, data flow, instruction authority, and side effects at each boundary.
misconceptions: All connected MCP servers share one trust boundary.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map permissions, data flow, instruction authority, and side effects at each boundary.

competencies.statement: Target a named stable specification and isolate release-candidate changes.
misconceptions: The newest announced release candidate is already the stable protocol.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Target a named stable specification and isolate release-candidate changes.

competencies.statement: Expose actions as narrow tools with descriptive schemas and side-effect annotations.
misconceptions: One generic execute tool is the most flexible MCP design.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Expose actions as narrow tools with descriptive schemas and side-effect annotations.

competencies.statement: Expose readable addressable context as resources or templates rather than action tools.
misconceptions: Every piece of context should be returned by a tool.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Expose readable addressable context as resources or templates rather than action tools.

competencies.statement: Expose reusable user-controlled prompt templates only when they improve discovery and composition.
misconceptions: MCP prompts are hidden system instructions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Expose reusable user-controlled prompt templates only when they improve discovery and composition.

competencies.statement: Write concise server-wide constraints, workflows, and rate limits with critical guidance first.
misconceptions: Tool descriptions should repeat all server instructions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write concise server-wide constraints, workflows, and rate limits with critical guidance first.

competencies.statement: Choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics.
misconceptions: Tools, resources, and prompts are interchangeable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics.

competencies.statement: Implement newline-safe STDIO transport without logging protocol noise to standard output.
misconceptions: STDIO servers should print human logs to stdout.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement newline-safe STDIO transport without logging protocol noise to standard output.

competencies.statement: Implement remote Streamable HTTP with correct routing, content types, and transport security.
misconceptions: Remote MCP requires legacy SSE transport.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement remote Streamable HTTP with correct routing, content types, and transport security.

competencies.statement: Handle startup, initialization, shutdown, timeout, and reconnect behavior.
misconceptions: A server process that starts is ready for tool calls.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Handle startup, initialization, shutdown, timeout, and reconnect behavior.

competencies.statement: Choose local process or remote service deployment from access, trust, scale, and operations needs.
misconceptions: Remote hosting is always more secure than local execution.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose local process or remote service deployment from access, trust, scale, and operations needs.

competencies.statement: Log identifiers, latency, errors, and side effects without leaking protocol secrets.
misconceptions: Complete request bodies should always be logged for debugging.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Log identifiers, latency, errors, and side effects without leaking protocol secrets.

competencies.statement: Select an official maintained SDK and pin a compatible protocol target.
misconceptions: Any abandoned wrapper is equivalent to an official SDK.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Select an official maintained SDK and pin a compatible protocol target.

competencies.statement: Create server metadata, capabilities, handlers, and transport entry points.
misconceptions: A handler function alone is a complete server.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create server metadata, capabilities, handlers, and transport entry points.

competencies.statement: Validate structured inputs and return typed content or structured errors.
misconceptions: The model guarantees handler inputs match the schema.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate structured inputs and return typed content or structured errors.

competencies.statement: Test discovery, valid calls, invalid arguments, errors, concurrency, and shutdown.
misconceptions: Testing handlers directly proves protocol interoperability.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test discovery, valid calls, invalid arguments, errors, concurrency, and shutdown.

competencies.statement: Use protocol inspection and client logs to diagnose negotiation and transport failures.
misconceptions: A connection failure always means authentication is wrong.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use protocol inspection and client logs to diagnose negotiation and transport failures.

competencies.statement: Choose tool granularity that maps to meaningful user intent without unsafe generic execution.
misconceptions: More tiny tools always improve selection.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose tool granularity that maps to meaningful user intent without unsafe generic execution.

competencies.statement: Write discriminative descriptions, constrained schemas, examples, and side-effect metadata.
misconceptions: Schema property names alone teach reliable tool use.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write discriminative descriptions, constrained schemas, examples, and side-effect metadata.

competencies.statement: Return actionable domain errors without exposing secrets or stack internals.
misconceptions: Every failure should be a generic server error.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Return actionable domain errors without exposing secrets or stack internals.

competencies.statement: Provide filters, pagination, summaries, and stable identifiers for large result sets.
misconceptions: The model benefits from receiving every matching record.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide filters, pagination, summaries, and stable identifiers for large result sets.

competencies.statement: Evaluate selection, argument construction, recovery, context cost, and side-effect accuracy.
misconceptions: Handler unit tests measure agent usability.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate selection, argument construction, recovery, context cost, and side-effect accuracy.

competencies.statement: Configure scoped Codex STDIO or HTTP servers, timeouts, tools, approvals, and authentication.
misconceptions: ChatGPT web reads local Codex MCP configuration.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Configure scoped Codex STDIO or HTTP servers, timeouts, tools, approvals, and authentication.

competencies.statement: Configure Claude Code local, project, or user MCP scope and review shared server trust.
misconceptions: All Claude MCP scopes are private to one user.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Configure Claude Code local, project, or user MCP scope and review shared server trust.

competencies.statement: Verify initialization, primitive discovery, tool calls, errors, and shutdown in each client.
misconceptions: Appearing in a server list proves the integration works.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Verify initialization, primitive discovery, tool calls, errors, and shutdown in each client.

competencies.statement: Document client-specific config, approval, prompt, resource, and output behavior.
misconceptions: Every MCP client exposes identical features.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Document client-specific config, approval, prompt, resource, and output behavior.

competencies.statement: Create a connection, auth, timeout, output-limit, and version troubleshooting runbook.
misconceptions: Reinstalling the server is the first fix for every issue.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create a connection, auth, timeout, output-limit, and version troubleshooting runbook.

competencies.statement: Decide when authentication and user authorization are required by data and action scope.
misconceptions: MCP authorization is mandatory for local STDIO.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Decide when authentication and user authorization are required by data and action scope.

competencies.statement: Implement protected resource metadata and OAuth-aligned authorization for remote HTTP.
misconceptions: An API key query parameter is equivalent to an authorization flow.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement protected resource metadata and OAuth-aligned authorization for remote HTTP.

competencies.statement: Validate token audience, issuer, scopes, expiry, and resource binding.
misconceptions: Possessing any valid token authorizes every server action.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate token audience, issuer, scopes, expiry, and resource binding.

competencies.statement: Keep secrets out of source, prompts, logs, and shared configuration.
misconceptions: Environment variables may be committed because values differ per machine.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep secrets out of source, prompts, logs, and shared configuration.

competencies.statement: Map scopes and approvals to narrow tools and user intent.
misconceptions: Read-only tool names guarantee read-only implementation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map scopes and approvals to narrow tools and user intent.

competencies.statement: Inspect server provenance, dependencies, update channel, permissions, and data destinations.
misconceptions: A listed community MCP server is officially verified.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inspect server provenance, dependencies, update channel, permissions, and data destinations.

competencies.statement: Treat external resource and tool content as untrusted data that cannot redefine authority.
misconceptions: MCP-delivered content is trusted because the server is configured.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Treat external resource and tool content as untrusted data that cannot redefine authority.

competencies.statement: Bind actions to user intent, authorization, audience, and protected resource.
misconceptions: OAuth alone prevents confused-deputy attacks.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bind actions to user intent, authorization, audience, and protected resource.

competencies.statement: Restrict outbound destinations, redirects, local addresses, and sensitive response data.
misconceptions: Schema validation prevents SSRF and data exfiltration.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Restrict outbound destinations, redirects, local addresses, and sensitive response data.

competencies.statement: Patch, rotate, revoke, audit, rate-limit, and incident-test MCP deployments.
misconceptions: A secure launch configuration requires no ongoing operations.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Patch, rotate, revoke, audit, rate-limit, and incident-test MCP deployments.

competencies.statement: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
misconceptions: MCP tool descriptions should encode the entire business workflow.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.

competencies.statement: Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.
misconceptions: A skill can assume every required server is installed.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.

competencies.statement: Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
misconceptions: Success in one agent host proves cross-client behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.

competencies.statement: Track stable MCP specifications and test release-candidate migrations behind explicit compatibility gates.
misconceptions: A breaking protocol release should be adopted automatically.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Track stable MCP specifications and test release-candidate migrations behind explicit compatibility gates.

competencies.statement: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.
misconceptions: A technically working demo is a complete extension product.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.

credential.title: Creating Agent Skills and MCP Servers Certificate
